_comment: Environment Variable definitions and values per environment. The 'definition' is in the solution (schema name, type, display name). The 'values' per environment must be set separately after import.
_howToApply: Run: pac env-var set --schema-name <schemaName> --value <value> (after switching to the target env)

variables.description: Base URL of the Halyse integration API. Differs per environment.
Number of times the external integration plugin retries on transient failure.
Controls verbosity of plugin trace logging. Values: Verbose, Info, Warning, Error
When true, plugins write detailed trace logs and skip external API calls (dry run).
Accounts with credit exposure above this % of credit limit trigger a warning.
